languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

languages.text: "Большинство мирян, потерявших конечности или органы, в лучшем случае удостаиваются простейших протезов. Исключение составляют те, кто занимает ключевые для Империума роли или чья служба не может нестись без замены органики на более эффективные аналоги".

"The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

traits.locale_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

"The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

"The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

languages.text: «La mayoría de los laicos que pierden extremidades u órganos reciben prótesis rudimentarias, y eso si tienen suerte de recibir alguna. Las excepciones se encuentran en los puestos clave del Imperium y en las personas que necesitan reemplazar sus componentes orgánicos por equivalentes más eficientes para realizar sus funciones».
languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

traits.locale_text: «La mayoría de los laicos que pierden extremidades u órganos reciben prótesis rudimentarias, y eso si tienen suerte de recibir alguna. Las excepciones se encuentran en los puestos clave del Imperium y en las personas que necesitan reemplazar sus componentes orgánicos por equivalentes más eficientes para realizar sus funciones».

languages.text: “大多数失去肢体或器官的教外人士，就算能装点什么，顶多也就是最基础的假肢。只有少数例外，比如那些在帝国担任关键职务的人，或者不把原生器官换成更高效的替代品就无法履行职责的人。”
languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

traits.locale_text: “大多数失去肢体或器官的教外人士，就算能装点什么，顶多也就是最基础的假肢。只有少数例外，比如那些在帝国担任关键职务的人，或者不把原生器官换成更高效的替代品就无法履行职责的人。”

languages.text: « La plupart des profanes ayant perdu un membre ou un organe reçoivent, dans le meilleur des cas, des prothèses parfaitement rudimentaires, et bien souvent, on les leur refuse. Les seules exceptions sont les personnes ayant des postes-clés au sein de l'Imperium ou incapables d'accomplir leur devoir sans un équivalent plus efficace. »
languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

traits.locale_text: « La plupart des profanes ayant perdu un membre ou un organe reçoivent, dans le meilleur des cas, des prothèses parfaitement rudimentaires, et bien souvent, on les leur refuse. Les seules exceptions sont les personnes ayant des postes-clés au sein de l'Imperium ou incapables d'accomplir leur devoir sans un équivalent plus efficace. »

languages.text: "Die meisten Laien, die Gliedmaßen oder Organe verloren haben, erhalten bestenfalls ausgesprochen rudimentäre Prothesen. Ausnahmen sind Personen, die innerhalb des Imperiums wichtige Positionen besetzen oder ihre Pflichten ohne den Ersatz ihrer Organe durch effizientere Äquivalente nicht nachkommen können."
languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

traits.locale_text: "Die meisten Laien, die Gliedmaßen oder Organe verloren haben, erhalten bestenfalls ausgesprochen rudimentäre Prothesen. Ausnahmen sind Personen, die innerhalb des Imperiums wichtige Positionen besetzen oder ihre Pflichten ohne den Ersatz ihrer Organe durch effizientere Äquivalente nicht nachkommen können."

languages.text: 「手足や臓器を失った一般人の大半は、せいぜい初歩的な義肢を装着する程度である。例外は、インペリウムの要職にある者や、より効率的な同等の器官と交換しなければ職務を遂行できない者である。」
languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

traits.locale_text: 「手足や臓器を失った一般人の大半は、せいぜい初歩的な義肢を装着する程度である。例外は、インペリウムの要職にある者や、より効率的な同等の器官と交換しなければ職務を遂行できない者である。」

languages.text: "Uzuvlarını veya organlarını kaybetmiş avamın büyük çoğunluğuna en iyi ihtimalle ilkel protezler sağlanır, tabii o da mümkün olursa. İmparatorluk'ta kilit mevkilerde bulunanlar veya organiklerini daha verimli eşdeğerleriyle değiştirmeden vazifelerini yerine getiremeyenler istisnadır."
languages.original_text: "The majority of laypersons who have lost limbs or organs are at best furnished with the most rudimentary prosthetics, if any at all. The exceptions are those who hold key posts in the Imperium or who cannot perform their duties without replacing their organics with more efficient equivalents."

İmparatorluk'ta kilit mevkilerde bulunanlar veya organiklerini daha verimli eşdeğerleriyle değiştirmeden vazifelerini yerine getiremeyenler istisnadır."
